overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Marvel's Spider-Man showing the character walking through a detailed New York City street at night. The scene features autumn foliage, active traffic, pedestrians, and urban storefronts with atmospheric street lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with convenience store and bar

events.description: Spider-Man steps off the sidewalk curb and begins crossing the street
Traffic light changes from red to green, allowing vehicles to proceed

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man walks across the crosswalk from the sidewalk to the opposite side of the street

notable_agents.action: black sedan waiting at the intersection then driving through as the light changes

entered.detail: corner store with green signage reading CONVENIENCE MART and large glass windows
vertical red neon sign reading BAR mounted on the building facade
large black trash bags piled on the sidewalk near the curb
white striped pedestrian crossing painted on the asphalt
dark colored sedan stopped at the traffic light

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man stands on a city sidewalk at night near garbage bags, then crosses the street at a crosswalk. A convenience store and bar sign are visible across the intersection. Vehicles including a black sedan wait at the red light before proceeding as the signal changes.

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man walks steadily along the sidewalk passing pedestrians and trees with autumn foliage

notable_agents.action: man in dark coat and flat cap standing on the sidewalk holding a shopping bag

entered.detail: trees with orange and yellow autumn leaves lining the sidewalk
tall street light illuminating the sidewalk with warm light

segments.scene_description: Walking along a concrete sidewalk lined with autumn trees, Spider-Man passes pedestrians including a man in a dark coat. Street lamps cast warm light on the path as the convenience store and intersection fade behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with police presence and pharmacy

events.description: Spider-Man begins crossing the second intersection at the crosswalk
Police officers are seen standing near their patrol car with flashing emergency lights

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man crosses the street and walks past a police car with officers standing nearby

notable_agents.action: white police sedan parked on the sidewalk with blue stripes and flashing red and blue lights
police officer in blue uniform standing next to the patrol car writing on a notepad

entered.detail: white corner building with green cross pharmacy signage and large windows
white police car with NYPD markings and emergency lights activated
yellow taxi cab driving through the intersection

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man crosses another intersection where a police car is parked on the sidewalk with officers nearby. A pharmacy building with a green cross sign stands on the corner while a yellow taxi drives past. The scene is busier with more pedestrian activity.

scene_state.functional_zone: wet sidewalk with storefronts and parked delivery vehicles

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man continues walking down the wet sidewalk past various storefronts and pedestrians

entered.detail: yellow signage for a fast cash business with red text
storefront with red fabric awnings over the entrance
orange and white delivery van parked along the curb

segments.scene_description: Walking along a wet concrete sidewalk that reflects the street lights, Spider-Man passes a fast cash business and storefronts with red awnings. An orange delivery van is parked along the street as the police car and pharmacy fade into the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bustling New York City street at night, transitioning from a quiet intersection to a densely packed commercial corridor. It begins with Spider-Man crossing a street past garbage bags and a convenience store as a black sedan waits for a signal change. As he moves forward, the scene shifts to a concrete sidewalk lined with autumn trees and warm street lamps, passing pedestrians as the initial intersection fades. The camera then follows him across another busy crossing where a yellow taxi drives past a pharmacy and parked police cars, before turning toward a stretch of wet pavement reflecting the city lights. Finally, the environment opens up to reveal storefronts with red awnings and a parked orange delivery van as the previous block recedes into the background.
